name: zoom
description: Search meetings and retrieve Zoom assets

interface.shortDescription: Search meetings and retrieve Zoom assets
interface.longDescription: Enables searching a user’s meetings, accessing past meeting assets (summaries, docs, whiteboards, recordings), and retrieving detailed recording resources such as transcripts, summaries, next steps, and playback URLs. Also supports listing a user’s cloud recordings and creating new meeting-related documents from Markdown content.
defaultPrompt: Search my recent Zoom meetings for the discussion about pricing.
Run /plan-zoom-product for a Zoom integration idea.
